CustomField.description: If checked, the head of household is an adult female with dependents, with no male significant other. This field is not intended to track a male single parent, or a single female with no children.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, the head of household is an adult female with dependents, with no male significant other. This field is not intended to track a male single parent, or a single female with no children.
CustomField.label: Female Head of Household
